raw_sql:
WITH company_film_counts AS (
  SELECT
    cn.id,
    cn.name,
    cn.country_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS film_count,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM company_name cn
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
  WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) >= 20
)
SELECT id, name, country_code, film_count, rnk
FROM company_film_counts
WHERE rnk > 10
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH company_film_counts AS (
  SELECT
    cn.id,
    cn.name,
    cn.country_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS film_count,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM company_name cn
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
  WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
    AND cn.country_code = '[us]'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%television%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%broadcast%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%CBS%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%NBC%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%ABC %'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%network%'
  GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) BETWEEN 50 AND 300
)
SELECT id, name, film_count, rnk
FROM company_film_counts
WHERE rnk > 10
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

predicates: ((name !~~* '%television%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%broadcast%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%CBS%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%NBC%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%ABC %'::text) AND (name !~~* '%network%'::text) AND ((country_code)::text = '[us]'::text))

raw_sql:
WITH company_film_counts AS (
  SELECT
    cn.id,
    cn.name,
    cn.country_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS film_count,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM company_name cn
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
  WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%television%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%broadcast%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%network%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%university%'
  GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name, cn.country_code
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) BETWEEN 30 AND 200
)
SELECT id, name, country_code, film_count, rnk
FROM company_film_counts
WHERE rnk > 10
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH company_film_counts AS (
  SELECT
    cn.id,
    cn.name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS film_count,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM company_name cn
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
  WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
    AND cn.country_code = '[us]'
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%television%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%broadcast%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%network%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%university%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%institute%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%school%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%entertainment%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Paramount%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Warner%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Universal%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Columbia%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Disney%'
    AND cn.name NOT ILIKE '%Fox%'
  GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) BETWEEN 25 AND 150
)
SELECT id, name, film_count, rnk
FROM company_film_counts
WHERE rnk > 10
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

predicates: ((name !~~* '%television%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%broadcast%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%network%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%university%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%institute%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%school%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%entertainment%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Paramount%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Warner%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Universal%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Columbia%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Disney%'::text) AND (name !~~* '%Fox%'::text) AND ((country_code)::text = '[us]'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  mi.info AS genre,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
GROUP BY cn.name, mi.info
ORDER BY cn.name, film_count DESC;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  (t.production_year / 10) * 10 AS decade,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
GROUP BY cn.name, decade
ORDER BY cn.name, decade;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  ROUND(AVG(mii.info::numeric), 2) AS avg_rating,
  MIN(mii.info::numeric) AS min_rating,
  MAX(mii.info::numeric) AS max_rating,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS rated_films
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
GROUP BY cn.name
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  rt.role,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS unique_people,
  COUNT(ci.id) AS total_credits
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress', 'director')
GROUP BY cn.name, rt.role
ORDER BY cn.name, rt.role;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rt.role = 'actor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS actor_credits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rt.role = 'actress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS actress_credits,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN rt.role = 'actress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN rt.role IN ('actor','actress') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100,
    1
  ) AS pct_female
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
GROUP BY cn.name
ORDER BY pct_female DESC;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  t.title,
  t.production_year,
  mii.info AS rating
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (5892, 19869, 66207)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND mii.info::numeric >= 7.5
ORDER BY cn.name, mii.info::numeric DESC;

SELECT
  cn.name AS company,
  mi.info AS genre,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS film_count
FROM company_name cn
JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies'
  AND cn.id IN (19869)
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1985 AND 2015
  AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
GROUP BY cn.name, mi.info
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 15;
